Note(s): The EPA sent a termination letter to NQ on 3/28/2025, formally ending Assistance Agreement No. 51-96263724, effective immediately, stating that the award no longer aligned with EPA program goals or funding priorities. NQ was required to submit final financial and technical reports within 120 days but was not required to submit property or MBE/WBE utilization reports. NQ could request payment for allowable costs incurred up to the termination date, and any unobligated funds had to be returned. The organization had the option to dispute the termination within 30 days of the notice. As a result, all progress report deadlines have been removed from the calendar.

Note(s):
The Hyde and Watson Foundation awarded Flanbwayan Haitian Literacy Project a $5,000 grant (Grant No. 9221202) to support the purchase of equipment. The grant period runs from October 30, 2025 through October 29, 2026. The Foundation sent an award notification email directly to Flanbwayan confirming approval of the Fall 2025 proposal.




A Grant Report is required and is available on the Foundation’s website. The report should be submitted by email as soon as the funds are expended or no later than one year from the date of the grant payment (due by October 30, 2026). Renewal eligibility typically opens one year after the grant period ends.
